allow: Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(process.env.USERPROFILE+''/tmp/schedule.json'',''utf8''\)\); d.dates[0].games.slice\(0,5\).forEach\(g => console.log\(g.gamePk, g.teams.away.team.name, ''@'', g.teams.home.team.name, g.status.detailedState\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(process.env.USERPROFILE+''/tmp/game.json'',''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''Top-level keys:'', Object.keys\(d\)\); console.log\(''liveData keys:'', Object.keys\(d.liveData\)\); console.log\(''plays keys:'', Object.keys\(d.liveData.plays\)\); console.log\(''Number of allPlays:'', d.liveData.plays.allPlays.length\)")

Bash(node -e "const s = require\(''./scripts/scenarios.json''\); const types = [...new Set\(s.map\(x=>x.eventType\)\)].sort\(\); types.forEach\(t => { const examples = s.filter\(x=>x.eventType===t\); console.log\(t + '' \('' + examples.length + ''\):''\); examples.slice\(0,2\).forEach\(e => console.log\(''  '' + e.runnerState + '' '' + e.outs + ''out batterEnd='' + e.batterEnd + '' runners='' + JSON.stringify\(e.runnerMovements\) + '' fielders='' + JSON.stringify\(e.fielders\)\)\); }\)")
Bash(node -e "const s = require\(''./scripts/scenarios.json''\); s.filter\(x=>x.eventType===''strikeout'' && x.batterEnd===''1B''\).forEach\(e => console.log\(JSON.stringify\(e, null, 2\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const s = require\(''./scripts/scenarios.json''\); [''wild_pitch'',''other_out'',''strikeout_double_play'',''sac_fly_double_play'',''pickoff_caught_stealing_2b''].forEach\(t => { const ex = s.filter\(x=>x.eventType===t\); ex.forEach\(e => console.log\(JSON.stringify\(e, null, 2\)\)\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "fetch\(''https://statsapi.mlb.com/api/v1/schedule?sportId=1&date=2026-03-30&hydrate=lineups,probablePitcher''\).then\(r=>r.json\(\)\).then\(d=>{for\(const dt of d.dates||[]\)for\(const g of dt.games||[]\)console.log\(g.gamePk, g.status?.detailedState, g.teams.away.team.name, ''@'', g.teams.home.team.name\)}\)")
